research_lead.eligibility_declaration: I am the human research lead for this solo M1 taxonomy evaluation under profile_version 2. I am not an AI agent. I accept that results are exploratory structural self-application only.
research_lead.conflict_declaration: I am protocol author and freeze authority for this study lineage. Under the solo profile this dual role is disclosed; it is not independent validation.
research_lead.isolation_declaration: Single-coder design: no second human primary. I will not treat AI outputs as final codes without my explicit accept/rewrite per cell.
research_lead.no_prior_prohibited_access_declaration: Before this intake I have not accessed planned taxonomy analysis output files under study-record-v3/outputs/. Case packet generation for multi-human isolation is not applicable; case contents will be used only as required by each analysis after this intake.

ai_tooling_disclosure.human_final_authority_assertion: LCMRP-HUMAN-MALLOYTHEDEV retains final authority for every rubric code and rationale. AI drafts are provisional until human accept.

dual_role_disclosure.statement: Solo research lead authored/froze the method supersession and will adjudicate. Findings must remain EXPLORATORY and must not claim multi-rater independence or external validation.

execution_authority.name: LCMRP-HUMAN-MALLOYTHEDEV
